channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Trump team says no child deaths from USAID cuts; three cases suggest otherwise
item.description: Marco Rubio and Elon Musk, who led the effort to close the foreign aid agency, have denied any deaths linked to the funding cuts.

item.title: Kalshi denies being a sportsbook despite World Cup betting surge
item.description: Kalshi became a top sports betting platform during the World Cup but avoids billions in taxes by claiming it is not a sportsbook.

item.title: Federal Reserve seeks the key to success of a Wisconsin tool maker
item.description: Snap-on, a century-old Wisconsin tool maker, is thriving. It recently received a fact-finding visit from the Federal Reserve.

item.title: GOP campaigns view immigration as a winning issue for midterms
item.description: Republicans are outspending Democrats on immigration ads ahead of the November midterms, according to an NP...
